description: Royal Rajasthan 2 takes you on a journey through the regal landscapes of Rajasthan, visiting iconic cities like Jaipur, Pushkar, Chittorgarh, Udaipur, Jodhpur, and Jaisalmer. Explore majestic forts, palaces, serene lakes, and vibrant markets, offering a perfect blend of history, culture, and architectural grandeur.
name: ROYAL RAJASTHAN 2
